productDisplayName: Fila Men Light Brown New Percoso II Casual Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with the finest fabrics crafted in Italys materials capital, Biella. This New Percoso II shoe from fila is an example of the brands excellent craftsmanship. The upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brands versatile power in innovating. These shoes are made for walking on all terrains as the powerful outsole and comfortably built inner and upper guarantee maximum comfort. Wear these with breathable nike t-shirts and capris. Upper Synthetic leather upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Perforations on the midfoot for ventilation Padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protection Outsole TPU outsole with terraced grooves along the spine of the foot and suction point lugs on the sides Outsole reinforced onto the upper in the midfoot region for shock absorption Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlightWarranty: 3 monthsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
